## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all-features`

## Compatibility

- [ ] Public CLI or YAML syntax changes are documented.
- [ ] Generated-output or manifest changes include regression tests.
- [ ] This change does not weaken path confinement or overwrite safety.
